title: calathea strobilifera
intro: Calathea strobilifera, also known as the conehead Calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, native to Brazil. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Calathea strobilifera can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
